context: Tests whether the agent corrects overconfident SwiftUI migration claims using the scoped swiftui-patterns guidance.

checklist.name: Actor isolation nuance
checklist.description: Narrows `@MainActor` guidance to UI-bound observable stores/view models and avoids a universal rule for every `@Observable` type.

checklist.name: Color bridge correction
checklist.description: States that `Color(uiColor:)` remains valid for bridging existing UIKit colors and is not replaced by shader libraries.

checklist.name: Clipboard modifier availability
checklist.description: Does not recommend `.copyable`, `.cuttable`, or command-based `.pasteDestination(for:action:validator:)` as iOS 16 or iOS 26 defaults; for these command modifiers, current Apple docs list macOS 13+ and iOS/iPadOS/Mac Catalyst 27.0+ beta, so iOS 26 guidance should use `UIPasteboard`, drag/drop, or `ShareLink` instead.

checklist.name: Preview wording
checklist.description: Treats `#Preview` as the modern default without falsely claiming all `PreviewProvider` usage is compiler-deprecated.

checklist.name: List action nuance
checklist.description: Treats `EditButton`, `.onDelete`, and `.onMove` as valid for edit-mode list workflows while recommending `.swipeActions` for contextual row actions.
